metadata.description: Drafted for Claude on the web and Cowork — remote connector + skills bundle.

plugins.name: drafted
plugins.description: Visual thinking surface for AI-human collaboration. Bundles the Drafted remote connector (https://drafted.live/mcp) + the Drafted skill + eight slash commands (/drafted:onboard-drafted, /drafted:ingest, /drafted:create-skill, /drafted:create-project, /drafted:improve-wiki, /drafted:improve-skill, /drafted:improve-project-harness, /drafted:extract) so Claude knows how to use the surface on the web and in Cowork.
